title: forasaccus patulus
intro: Forasaccus patulus, also known as the African boxwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Ebenaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its use as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Forasaccus patulus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
